title.zh-TW: README/使用文件更新：多庫、不知 ID 使用情境
title.en: README/Usage Document Update: Multiple Workspaces, Unknown ID Scenario

body.zh-TW: README 和使用文件已更新，說明多庫、不知 ID 使用情境：設定 `MEMTRACE_TOKEN`，然後先呼叫 `list_workspaces` 取得工作區清單，再決定要操作哪個工作區。
body.en: The README and usage documentation have been updated to describe the multiple workspaces, unknown ID scenario: set `MEMTRACE_TOKEN`, then first call `list_workspaces` to retrieve the list of workspaces before deciding which one to operate on.
